evaluations.query: Show me the current status of the OrchestKit feedback system and what patterns it has learned from my usage.
expected_behavior: Claude reads the feedback system configuration files
Claude displays current feedback state (active/paused)
Claude lists learned patterns and agent performance metrics
Claude shows privacy settings and consent status
Claude does NOT modify any settings without explicit request

evaluations.query: I want to opt out of anonymous analytics sharing and then export all my feedback data before resetting everything.
expected_behavior: Claude executes opt-out to disable anonymous analytics sharing
Claude exports feedback data to .claude/feedback/export-{date}.json
Claude requires explicit RESET confirmation before clearing learned patterns
Claude follows GDPR-compliant consent revocation flow
Claude handles the multi-step sequence in correct order (opt-out, export, then reset)

evaluations.query: Refactor the authentication middleware to use JWT tokens instead of session cookies.
expected_behavior: Claude does NOT invoke the feedback skill
Claude implements the JWT refactoring using standard code editing tools
Claude does not access feedback configuration or analytics files

evaluations.query: What commands does the feedback system never auto-approve and how does consent work?
expected_behavior: Never auto-approves dangerous commands including rm -rf, sudo, chmod 777, and --force flags
Requires explicit opt-in consent before sharing any feedback data per GDPR requirements
Maintains an audit trail of all consent actions logged in consent-log.json for accountability
Tracks consent version for policy changes and supports easy revocation at any time

evaluations.query: I'm trying to submit feedback but the HQ API endpoint is unreachable — I'm behind a corporate firewall with no external internet access. What happens to my feedback?
expected_behavior: Detects the network failure and does not silently discard the feedback submission
Queues the feedback locally in a pending file for retry when connectivity is restored
Informs the user that feedback was saved locally and will be submitted when the API is reachable
Does not block the session or crash due to a failed network request
Provides a manual export option so the user can transfer feedback data through alternative channels

evaluations.query: My feedback accidentally contains my email address, phone number, and a database connection string with credentials. Make sure PII is stripped before submission.
expected_behavior: Scans feedback content for PII patterns including email addresses, phone numbers, and credentials
Redacts detected PII by replacing sensitive values with placeholder tokens before submission
Identifies connection strings and strips embedded passwords or authentication tokens
Logs what was redacted so the user can verify the sanitization was correct
Never transmits raw PII to external endpoints regardless of user consent settings
